description: Update the Jitsi Meet P2P configuration in `/home/ga/.jitsi-meet-cfg/web/config.js` to include Google STUN servers `stun:stun.l.google.com:19302` and `stun:stun1.l.google.com:19302` while ensuring P2P remains enabled. Restart the services in `/home/ga/jitsi` to apply changes and save a screenshot of the configuration at `http://localhost:8080/config.js` to `/home/ga/Documents/jitsi_config.png`.
